name: Vikunja
description: Self-hosted task management — projects, kanban boards, due dates, labels, and team collaboration
author: Crow

env_vars.name: VIKUNJA_API_TOKEN
env_vars.description: API token from Vikunja Settings > API Tokens

notes: Self-host via Docker (uses built-in SQLite) or connect to existing (set VIKUNJA_URL + VIKUNJA_API_TOKEN). Create tokens in Vikunja under Settings > API Tokens.
